title: taraxacum duplidentiforme
intro: Taraxacum duplidentiforme, also known as the lesser common dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as supporting liver function, reducing blood sugar levels, and acting as a natural laxative. Taraxacum duplidentiforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
